meaning: n.西迷舞,摇动v.摇动,震颤,晃动
examples: I want to shimmy when I dance and wiggle when I walk.
You know what else these are good for? Frees up your shoulders to shimmy.
SCARLETT: He looks as if, as if he knows what I looked like without my shimmy.
It's perhaps worth noting, though, that Thomson has managed to shimmy past regulators before.
Babies will not shimmy under the covers to sleep on your feet when you're cold.
